text:
Market today: Mixed signals. Consumer prices are cooling, which is good for your tech-heavy book. But rising oil prices due to geopolitical tension could fuel inflation elsewhere and hurt consumer spending.

Your holdings: SOXL (-27.35%) and SPAL (-31.17%) are leveraged, deep in the red, and marked for attention. Margin amplifies these drops, making them extra painful. PTNM (-15.25%) is also a new, tiny spec with a significant loss.

Watch: Keep a close eye on oil prices and any further inflation data. These will dictate the market's next moves and directly impact your tech/chip names.

Bottom line: Protect your capital in leveraged, losing positions while monitoring macro shifts for opportunities.
plays: SOXL: This leveraged position is down -27.35% and marked "SELL". Consider trimming or exiting if it approaches your stop at 200 to protect capital.
SPAL: Your new leveraged ETF is down -31.17%. Review and respect its stop at 21.38 to prevent further amplified losses.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
